step_rationale: Decreased linoleic-acid-containing phosphatidylcholine predicts post-MI mortality; myocardial lipid remodeling marker.
mechanism: Decreased phosphatidylcholine (18:2) content post-MI reflects myocardial membrane degradation and cardiomyocyte injury.

references.title: Lipidomic analyses reveal potential biomarkers for predicting death and heart failure after acute myocardial infarction.
references.journal: Clinica chimica acta; international journal of clinical chemistry
